title: ConceptMapping
description: Mapping from an ontology term to an external concept.

conceptMappingType.description: Type of mapping used to align this term with an external concept.

conceptIri.description: External concept IRI to map this ontology term to.

mappingType.description: Type of mapping used for the external concept alignment.

schemeIri.description: Optional external concept scheme IRI for the mapped concept.

source.description: Optional source label or catalog for the external concept.
